message:
fix(gateway): resolve TypeScript BufferSource type error in idempotency middleware (flywheel_gateway-d94)

Create explicit ArrayBuffer for crypto.subtle.digest to satisfy TypeScript 5.9+ strict
typing for BufferSource, which no longer accepts Uint8Array with ArrayBufferLike backing.

This closes the EPIC flywheel_gateway-d94 "Code Quality & Test Stabilization":
- TypeScript passes with 0 errors
- All 2212 tests pass (11 env-specific skips)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
